title: blepharis glomerata
intro: Blepharis glomerata, also known as sticky blue-flower or blue throat, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Blepharis glomerata include its potential to treat fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic and to lower blood pressure. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
